system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_sodo_catvan_getbyorder","body":"
CREATE PROC TR_SODO_CATVAN_GETBYORDER
(
	@donhang nvarchar(max)
)
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @TB_NGUYENLIEU TABLE
	(
		nguyenlieu nvarchar(200)
	)

	INSERT INTO @TB_NGUYENLIEU(nguyenlieu)
	VALUES ('LBV'), ('LVB'), ('LVD'), ('LVP'), ('MDF'), ('PB'), ('PLYWOOD'), ('VÁN ÉP'),
		(N'LVB BẠCH DƯƠNG VNR BẠCH DƯƠNG 0.3, BẠCH DƯƠNG 0.3'),
		(N'LVD CAO SU VNR THÔNG 0.3, VNR THÔNG 0.3'),
		(N'LVL CAO SU VNR BẠCH DƯƠNG 0.3, BẠCH DƯƠNG 0.3'),
		(N'LVL CAO SU VNR TẠP 0.3, VNR TẠP 0.3')

	SELECT A.order_number, A.item_number, SUM(A.order_qty) AS  order_qty
	INTO #DONHANG_SANXUAT
	FROM tr_order_detail A
	WHERE A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND A.order_number IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@donhang, ','))
	GROUP BY A.order_number, A.item_number

	SELECT B.order_number, A.masp, A.mact, A.chitiet, 
		A.nguyenlieu, A.dayy_tc, A.rong_tc, A.dai_tc, A.soluong_tc,
		soluong_donhang = B.order_qty,
		soluongcan = A.soluong_tc * B.order_qty,
		sokhoi = A.m3_tc * B.order_qty,
		A.veneer_canhdai, A.veneer_canhngan,
		A.veneer_matchinh, A.veneer_matphu, A.veneer_dan_canh,
		C.loaihang AS tenveneer_matchinh, 
		D.loaihang AS tenveneer_matphu, 
		E.loaihang AS tenveneer_dan_canh,
		A.ghichu
	FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan A
	INNER JOIN #DONHANG_SANXUAT B ON A.masp = B.item_number
	LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer C ON A.veneer_matchinh = C.id
	LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer D ON A.veneer_matphu = D.id
	LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer E ON A.veneer_dan_canh = E.id
	WHERE A.nguyenlieu IN (SELECT nguyenlieu FROM @TB_NGUYENLIEU)
	ORDER BY B.order_number, A.masp

	DROP TABLE #DONHANG_SANXUAT;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_order_detail"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
